title: Fix for Function in generate block results in "Broken link in node" crash (#7236)
body:
Mirrors the same approach that was already used to solve the same issue for VarXRef.

- Adds a m_containsGenBlock flag to AstNodeFTaskRef.
- Set the flag when FTaskRef happens in a generate block in an if or case.
- The visitor is added similarly to visit(AstVarXRef*)
- linkDotParamd() reresolves.

Added the OG issues simple test with headers, etc.

Regression clean.
